candidates.notes: ANOVA is computable and FM1 (space) main effect is large (eta^2 = 0.55-0.88), confirming parameter vs representation space matters enormously. However, FM2 (scoring) main effect is EXACTLY zero because Kendall tau (and all rank-correlation metrics) are mathematically invariant to mean subtraction. This makes the FM1xFM2 interaction analysis vacuous -- there IS no FM2 signal to interact with. Decision Gate 1 FAILS: FM2 demoted to theoretical hypothesis. The 2-way ANOVA degenerates to a 1-way analysis of FM1. Contamination injection shows structured contamination degrades performance (35-56pp on RepSim) but contrastive correction does NOT recover it because non-uniform perturbations change pairwise orderings irreversibly. GO recommendation is for proceeding with FM1-focused analysis only.
